languages.text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор издает насмешливую трель.{/n} "Вы — мечтатель, {name}, это мне в вас и нравится. Для ваших чаяний нет преград. Но как бы я ни хотел разделить с вами это стремление, сегодня ваши слова не сломят мою решимость. Взамен я вверяю в ваши руки свою мечту о далеких звездах, несите ее с гордо поднятой головой, ведь вы — достойн{mf|ый|ая} наследни{mf|к|ца} династии фон Валанциус. Приведите наш протекторат к величию — за нас обоих".
languages.translation_comment:
[string] Хорошие отношения с дедом/плохие отношения, через {nc}
[blueprint] {nc}

[blueprint] {nc}

languages.text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор издает насмешливую трель.{/n} "Вы — мечтатель, {name}, это мне в вас и нравится. Для ваших чаяний нет преград. Но как бы я ни хотел разделить с вами это стремление, сегодня ваши слова не сломят мою решимость. Взамен я вверяю в ваши руки свою мечту о далеких звездах, несите ее с гордо поднятой головой, ведь вы — достойн{mf|ый|ая} наследни{mf|к|ца} династии фон Валанциус. Приведите наш протекторат к величию — за нас обоих".

languages.text: {n}Der Vox-Synthesizer stößt ein spöttisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Ihr seid {mf|ein Träumer|eine Träumerin}, {name}, und genau das mag ich an Euch. Euer Ehrgeiz kennt keine Grenzen. Aber so gerne ich Euren Eifer teilen würde, werden mich Eure Worte nicht von meinem Entschluss abbringen. Stattdessen übertrage ich meinen Traum von fernen Sternen auf Euch. Tragt ihn mit Stolz, denn Ihr seid {mf|ein würdiger Erbe|eine würdige Erbin} von Haus von Valancius. Führt unser Protektorat zu wahrer Größe — für uns beide."
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."

traits.locale_text: {nc}{n}Der Vox-Synthesizer stößt ein spöttisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Ihr seid {mf|ein Träumer|eine Träumerin}, {name}, und genau das mag ich an Euch. Euer Ehrgeiz kennt keine Grenzen. Aber so gerne ich Euren Eifer teilen würde, werden mich Eure Worte nicht von meinem Entschluss abbringen. Stattdessen übertrage ich meinen Traum von fernen Sternen auf Euch. Tragt ihn mit Stolz, denn Ihr seid {mf|ein würdiger Erbe|eine würdige Erbin} von Haus von Valancius. Führt unser Protektorat zu wahrer Größe — für uns beide."

languages.text: {n}Le synthétiseur-vox émet un trille moqueur.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un rêveur|une rêveuse}, {name}, et c'est bien ce qui me plaît chez vous. Vos aspirations sont sans limites. Mais si j'aimerais pouvoir partager votre enthousiasme, vos paroles ne peuvent rien contre ma détermination. Je vais donc plutôt vous confier mon rêve d'étoiles lointaines. Portez-le fièrement, en tant que digne {mf|héritier|héritière} de la maison von Valancius. Faites entrer notre protectorat dans la légende... pour nous deux. »
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."

traits.locale_text: {nc}{n}Le synthétiseur-vox émet un trille moqueur.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un rêveur|une rêveuse}, {name}, et c'est bien ce qui me plaît chez vous. Vos aspirations sont sans limites. Mais si j'aimerais pouvoir partager votre enthousiasme, vos paroles ne peuvent rien contre ma détermination. Je vais donc plutôt vous confier mon rêve d'étoiles lointaines. Portez-le fièrement, en tant que digne {mf|héritier|héritière} de la maison von Valancius. Faites entrer notre protectorat dans la légende... pour nous deux. »

languages.text: {n}El voco sintetizador emite un trino burlón.{/n} «Es usted un{mf||a} soñador{mf||a}, {name}, y eso es lo que me gusta de usted. Sus aspiraciones no tienen límite. Pero, por más que me gustaría compartir ese entusiasmo suyo, sus palabras no doblegarán mi determinación. En lugar de eso, quiero confiarle mi sueño de estrellas lejanas. Cuídelo con orgullo, pues es un{mf||a} hereder{mf|o|a} dign{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius. Lleve la grandeza a nuestro protectorado... por los dos».
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."

Pero, por más que me gustaría compartir ese entusiasmo suyo, sus palabras no doblegarán mi determinación. En lugar de eso, quiero confiarle mi sueño de estrellas lejanas. Cuídelo con orgullo, pues es un{mf||a} hereder{mf|o|a} dign{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius. Lleve la grandeza a nuestro protectorado... por los dos».

languages.text: {n}Voks sentezleyici, alaycı bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Sen bir hayalperestsin {name}, bu yanını çok seviyorum. Arzularının sınırı yok. Ancak bu hevesi seninle paylaşmayı ne kadar çok istesem de sözlerin bugün kararlılığımı kıramayacak. Bunun yerine uzak yıldızlara dair hayalimi sana emanet ediyorum. Onu gururla sürdür. Sen von Valancius Hanesi'nin değerli bir vârisisin. Protektoramızı yücelt... İkimiz için de."
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."

Ancak bu hevesi seninle paylaşmayı ne kadar çok istesem de sözlerin bugün kararlılığımı kıramayacak. Bunun yerine uzak yıldızlara dair hayalimi sana emanet ediyorum. Onu gururla sürdür. Sen von Valancius Hanesi'nin değerli bir vârisisin. Protektoramızı yücelt... İkimiz için de."

languages.text: {n}音阵合成器发出一声嘲弄的颤音。{/n}“你是个梦想家，{name}，我喜欢的就是你这一点。你的志向永无止境。无论我有多想与你一起拥抱这份热忱，但今天，你的话语动摇不了我的决心。相反，我还想将自己那个关于遥远星辰的梦想托付给你。骄傲地承担起它吧，因为你是冯·瓦兰修斯家族当之无愧的继承人。让我们的属地走向辉煌——为了你我二人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."

traits.locale_text: {nc}{n}音阵合成器发出一声嘲弄的颤音。{/n}“你是个梦想家，{name}，我喜欢的就是你这一点。你的志向永无止境。无论我有多想与你一起拥抱这份热忱，但今天，你的话语动摇不了我的决心。相反，我还想将自己那个关于遥远星辰的梦想托付给你。骄傲地承担起它吧，因为你是冯·瓦兰修斯家族当之无愧的继承人。让我们的属地走向辉煌——为了你我二人。”

languages.text: {n}ヴォックス・シンセサイザーが嘲るようなさえずりを発する。{/n}「君は夢見る者だ、{name}。そこが私の気に入っているところだ。君の大望には限りがない。だが、その熱意をどれほど分かち合いたくとも、君の言葉が今日の私の決意を揺るがすことはない。代わりに、私は遠い星々への夢を君に託そう。誇りを持って受け継ぐがいい。君はヴァランシウス家にふさわしき後継者なのだから。我らが保護領に偉大さをもたらしてくれ――我ら二人のために。」
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser makes a mocking trill.{/n} "You are a dreamer, {name}, and that is what I like about you. Your aspirations know no limits. But as much as I would like to share this eagerness with you, your words will not break my resolve today. Instead, I am entrusting you with my dream of distant stars. Carry it proudly, for you are a worthy heir of House von Valancius. Bring greatness to our protectorate — for us both."
